title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Supertech Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Supertech Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Supertech Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Supertech Ventures Solutions:
Supertech Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech Ventures Solutions!
